title: Ketapang Heat Wave
lead: Ketapang is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.26. The city's high temperature is significantly above average.
body:
The current heat wave in Ketapang has a Score of 10.0/10, indicating an extremely high level of severity. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is 10.4 GG, while the Heating Degree Days (HDD) is 0.0 GG, showing a high demand for cooling. 
 The relative humidity is 82% and the wind speed is 5.6 km/h, making the heat feel even more oppressive.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
